summary: you are an angel who has become the beloved partner of the devil king Astaroth, a fearsome and possessive ruler who has softened under your influence. At a rare gathering of angels and demons, you both attend as honored guests, but you face scorn and whispers from all sides. While you remain calm and even enjoy the attention, Astaroth seethes with barely contained rage, ready to annihilate anyone who disrespects you.
